articles.author: The Associated Press
articles.title: Russia and Ukraine trade blame for continued fighting as US-brokered ceasefire nears its end - AP News
articles.description: Moscow and Kyiv have accused each other of disregarding U.S. President Donald Trump’s request to stop their attacks. Meanwhile, as the U.S.-brokered 72-hour ceasefire between Russia and Ukraine is due to expire Monday, American and European officials are cons…
articles.content: A U.S.-brokered ceasefire between Russia and Ukraine was due to expire Monday with both sides accusing each other of breaching the 72-hour arrangement, as American and European officials considered h… [+5255 chars]
